assignments.name: planningNotes
assignments.value: Paste your sprint planning notes here before running the workflow.

options.systemMessage: You are a fast duplicate checker. Output only a JSON object with keys: duplicates (array of topics already covered by existing issues) and new (array of topics that are genuinely new). Be concise, no markdown fences.

parameters.text:
=You are a software engineering manager creating GitHub issues from sprint planning notes for the Modus Web Components repository.

Planning Notes:
{{ $('Planning Notes Input').first().json.planningNotes }}

Topics already covered by existing issues (DO NOT create issues for these):
{{ (() => { try { const raw = $('Check Duplicates').first().json.output || ''; const cleaned = raw.replace(/```json?\s*/gi,'').replace(/```/g,'').trim(); return JSON.parse(cleaned).duplicates?.join('\n') || 'none'; } catch(e) { return 'none'; } })() }}

Only create issues for topics NOT in the duplicates list above.

Classify each issue and assign exactly ONE label:
- "bug" — something broken or not working (triggers PATCH version bump)
- "enhancement" — new feature, new prop, new component, new event (triggers MINOR version bump)
- "breaking-change" — incompatible API change: removed prop, renamed event, changed prop type (triggers MAJOR version bump)
- "chore" — internal task: docs, testing, refactor, skip-changelog items

For BUG issues use this body template:
### Prerequisites
- [x] I have searched for duplicate or closed issues
- [x] I have read the contributing guidelines

### Describe the issue
<clear description of the bug and expected behaviour>

### Reduced test cases
<steps to reproduce or N/A>

### What operating system(s) are you seeing the problem on?
N/A

### What browser(s) are you seeing the problem on?
N/A

### What is the issue regarding?
@trimble-oss/modus-wc

### Priority
<High / Medium / Low>

### What product/project are you using Modus Web Components for?
Modus

### What is your team/division name?
Modus

### Are you willing to contribute?
None

### Are you using Modus Web Components in production?
_No response_

For FEATURE/ENHANCEMENT issues use this body template:
### Prerequisites
- [x] I have searched for duplicate or closed feature requests
- [x] I have read the Modus style guidelines

### Proposal
<detailed description of the feature>

### Motivation and context
<why this is needed>

### What is the issue regarding?
@trimble-oss/modus-wc

### Priority
<High / Medium / Low>

### What product/project are you using Modus Components for?
Modus

### What is your team/division name?
Modus

### Are you willing to contribute?
None

### Are you using Modus Web Components in production?
_No response_

For CHORE/BREAKING-CHANGE issues use this body template:
### Summary
<what needs to be done>

### Context
<why it matters>

### Acceptance Criteria
- <bullet list of what done looks like>

### Priority
<High / Medium / Low>

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON array. No markdown fences, no extra text:
[
  {
    "title": "concise imperative title",
    "body": "full markdown body following the correct template above",
    "label": "bug|enhancement|breaking-change|chore",
    "assignee": null
  }
]

options.systemMessage: You are an issue creation assistant for the Modus Web Components repo. Output only a valid JSON array, no markdown fences, no extra text. Each issue must have exactly one label: bug, enhancement, breaking-change, or chore.
